skills.name: tako
skills.description: Tako CLI commands: init, dev, deploy, secrets, typegen, scale, logs, rollback, servers, doctor. Includes output design patterns for interactive and plain modes.

skills.name: tako-sdk-go
skills.description: tako.sh Go SDK: ListenAndServe for http.Handler, Listener for custom servers, typed secrets via tako typegen, metadata helpers.

skills.name: tako-sdk-js
skills.description: tako.sh SDK: fetch handler interface, generated tako.gen.ts for runtime state + typed secrets, defineChannel/defineWorkflow, Vite and Next.js adapters.
